author: Burners
text:
ensure_main_gitignore: gitignore .balls/code-refs unconditionally

The code-refs cache is materialized by delivery_remote::ensure_cache on any --resolve-remote regardless of mode, so a stealth-mode repo opting into --resolve-remote got an untracked .balls/code-refs/ tree that escaped .gitignore. Move it out of the non-stealth-only block into the always-wanted list, alongside the other mode-independent paths. .balls/tasks and .balls/worktree stay non-stealth-gated — correct, since they do not exist in stealth mode.

Add a stealth-init test asserting .gitignore covers .balls/code-refs.
